stemHtml: What privilege does a Multi-Crew Pilot Licence (MPL) confer?

options.a: The right to act as co-pilot in aircraft that require a co-pilot.
options.b: The right to act as PIC of any aircraft.
options.c: The right to act as co-pilot in aircraft above 5.7 tonnes.
options.d: The right to act as co-pilot in aircraft with an MTOM above 2.7 tonnes.
